source.description: Planned six-panel generated raster marker process sheet for the May 31, 2026 honest archive lesson.
source.notes: One un-faced striped popcorn bucket sits centered, with all kernels and color blocks established before the final panel.

process_strategy: The sequence lays in the tapered bucket and top rim, adds the popcorn cloud and individual kernel lobes, then uses a bold black outline, stripe bands, and yellow/red marker fills before only a final cleanup pass.

final_elements.name: tapered bucket body
final_elements.description: A simple open trapezoid bucket with a narrow bottom.

final_elements.name: top rim ellipse
final_elements.description: A curved open rim across the top of the bucket.

final_elements.name: popcorn cloud
final_elements.description: A cluster of rounded kernel bumps spilling from the rim.

final_elements.name: individual kernel lobes
final_elements.description: A few inner kernel divisions within the existing popcorn cloud.

final_elements.name: thick black outline
final_elements.description: A bold marker contour around established bucket and popcorn shapes.

final_elements.name: vertical stripe bands
final_elements.description: Three clear vertical bands on the already drawn bucket body.

final_elements.name: red bucket and yellow popcorn fills
final_elements.description: Red marker stripes, a white bucket ground, and warm yellow popcorn with orange kernel accents.

frames.visible_job: Lightly places the tapered bucket body and top rim ellipse.
Adds the rounded popcorn cloud growing from the established rim.
Adds a few light inner kernel lobes inside the existing popcorn cloud.
Thickens the established bucket and popcorn contours, then adds three unfilled vertical stripe bands to the existing bucket body.
Fills established bucket stripes red and popcorn yellow with orange kernel accents, leaving the bucket ground light.
introduces: red bucket and yellow popcorn fills

final_step.visible_job: Only tidies existing outlines, stripes, kernel lobes, and the established red, yellow, and orange marker fills.

rejection_checks: No bucket, rim, popcorn cluster, kernel lobe, stripe, outline, or color area may first appear in the final panel.
The bucket must keep the same centered crop and tapered proportions in every frame.
The finish must read as handmade marker doodle art, not a clean vector snack logo.
